en: I thought I was going faster.
ko: 나는 더 빨리 가고 있다고 생각했어.

en: You were supposed to be this colossus.
ko: 너는 이 거대한 존재가 되어야 했어.

en: You were this great legendary thing, and yet he gains.
ko: 너는 전설적인 존재였는데, 그는 점점 더 가까워져.

en: Well, I'm carrying three people, and he got on to himself.
ko: 나는 세 사람을 태우고 있고, 그는 혼자서 올라탔어.

en: I do not accept excuses. I'm just going to have to find myself a new giant, that's all.
ko: 변명은 받아들이지 않아. 새로운 거인을 찾아야겠어, 그게 전부야.

en: Don't say that, Vincenit. Please. Please.
ko: 그런 말 하지 마, 빈센트. 제발. 제발.

en: Did I make it clear that your job is at stake?
ko: 네 일이 위험하다는 걸 분명히 했던 거 맞지?
